pharma.title: Sun Pharma closes in on Organon buy, gets set for $12 billion binding bid
pharma.summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries moves forward with a $12 billion binding bid to acquire Organon & Co., potentially transforming the landscape of Indian pharmaceuticals and marking the largest overseas acquisition by an Indian pharma company.

pharma.title: Iran conflict: Pharma supply chains may take months to recover

providers.title: IHH Healthcare aims to hike its stake in Fortis to 50%: CEO Prem Kumar Nair

providers.title: PGI revamps procurement after Ayushman Bharat scam
